policy: Local deterministic surfaces are labeled as tools, not external human adoption or model-provider evidence.

local-deterministic-grader.label: Fixture-local deterministic execution and marker grader
local-deterministic-grader.limitation: This is a repository-owned tool surface, not an independent model surface.

claude-code-safe.label: Claude Code CLI with tools disabled
claude-code-safe.execution: local CLI, print mode, tools disabled

claude-code-safe.delta: repaired prompts satisfied 0.5 more outcome checks on average
claude-code-safe.reviewability_delta: repaired prompts scored 4.0 reviewability points higher on average
claude-code-safe.evidence: recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring
claude-code-safe.limitation: model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; reviewability scoring remains secondary

codex-cli-default.delta: weak and repaired prompts tied on outcome checks
codex-cli-default.reviewability_delta: repaired prompts scored 2.3 reviewability points higher on average
codex-cli-default.evidence: recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring
codex-cli-default.limitation: model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; reviewability scoring remains secondary

local-deterministic-grader.delta: repaired artifact passes where weak artifact fails
local-deterministic-grader.evidence: fixture-local artifact execution where grader exists
local-deterministic-grader.limitation: repository-owned deterministic tool surface, not independent model evidence
